publicationNotes.Austin Business Journal: Leading local business publication. Ali Juell is dedicated residential RE reporter (new position created Jan 2026).
publicationNotes.Austin American-Statesman: Major daily newspaper. Shonda Novak is veteran real estate reporter with NAREE connections.
publicationNotes.Community Impact: Hyperlocal publication with ~2M distribution across Austin metro. Multiple edition coverage.
publicationNotes.Inman News: Leading national real estate industry publication. Key for brokerage and tech stories.
publicationNotes.HousingWire: National housing industry publication. Covers market trends and technology.
publicationNotes.KVUE: ABC affiliate, has 'Boomtown' series on Austin growth. 75+ journalists on staff.
publicationNotes.KXAN: NBC affiliate with largest investigative unit in Central Texas (9 journalists).
publicationNotes.The Real Deal Texas: Commercial real estate focus, need more research on current staff.
publicationNotes.Austin Monthly: Lifestyle publication, need research on real estate coverage.
publicationNotes.FOX 7: Need research on current business/real estate reporters.
publicationNotes.KEYE: CBS affiliate, need research on current staff.
